milestoneTitle: Phase M9.10 — v0.7.0 stamp. The design-system refactor is code-complete. Every planned surface (Learn flat layout, Projects hash-routed Finder, Tools mastered bucket + chip filter, every-section YouTube tile, modal glass parity, bootstrapper ghost) shipped under the M9.* dev cadence. The body::before ambient overlay was inspected against the lighter M9.9 panels and held at current alphas (top 0.16 / bottom 0.14 warm-greige washes) pending a live phone sweep at M9.11 — bumping preemptively would be guessing. A separate deferred contrast/readability review is flagged in docs/plans/v0.7-design-system-refactor.md (7 specific candidates) for a dedicated pass after the sweep. Next: M9.11 live phone review; surgical fixes only if regressions surface.
